selections.name_ch: 兩隊均取得入球 & 利雲特勝 & 開出總角球多於[11.5]球
selections.name_en: Both teams to score & Levante to win & Over [11.5] corners taken

selections.name_ch: 利雲特勝 & 總入球多於[3.5]球 & 開出總角球多於[11.5]球
selections.name_en: Levante to win & Over [3.5] goals & Over [11.5] corners taken

selections.name_ch: 利雲特半場勝[1:0] & 利雲特全場勝[3:0]
selections.name_en: Levante to win [1:0] in the first half & Levante to win [3:0] in the match

selections.name_ch: 兩隊均取得入球 & 總入球多於[3.5]球 & 開出總角球多於[12.5]球
selections.name_en: Both teams to score & Over [3.5] goals & Over [12.5] corners taken

selections.name_ch: 兩隊均取得入球 & 基羅納勝 & 開出總角球少於[10.5]球
selections.name_en: Both teams to score & Girona to win & Under [10.5] corners taken

selections.name_ch: 全場兩隊均取得入球 & 半場和 & 利雲特全場淨勝[2]球或以上
selections.name_en: Both teams to score in the match & First Half to be drawn & Levante to win the match by [2] goal(s) or more

selections.name_ch: 基羅納首隊入球 & 利雲特淨勝剛好[1]球
selections.name_en: Girona to score first & Levante to win by exactly [1] goal(s)

selections.name_ch: 利雲特首隊入球 & 利雲特半場勝 & 半場總入球多於[2.5]球
selections.name_en: Levante to score first in the match & Levante to win the first half & Over [2.5] goals in the first half

selections.name_ch: 半場開出總角球多於[7.5]球 & 全場開出總角球多於[12.5]球
selections.name_en: Over [7.5] corners taken in the first half & Over [12.5] corners taken in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場開出總角球少於[3.5]球 & 全場開出總角球少於[6.5]球
selections.name_en: Under [3.5] corners taken in the first half & Under [6.5] corners taken in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場總入球多於[1.5]球 & 全場總入球多於[3.5]球 & 全場開出總角球多於[11.5]球
selections.name_en: Over [1.5] goals in the first half & Over [3.5] goals in the match & Over [11.5] corners taken in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場總入球少於[1.5]球 & 全場總入球少於[2.5]球 & 全場開出總角球少於[6.5]球
selections.name_en: Under [1.5] goals in the first half & Under [2.5] goals in the match & Under [6.5] corners taken in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場和 & 利雲特全場淨勝[2]球或以上
selections.name_en: First Half to be drawn & Levante to win the match by [2] goal(s) or more

selections.name_ch: 半場總入球多於[2.5]球 & 全場總入球多於[4.5]球
selections.name_en: Over [2.5] goals in the first half & Over [4.5] goals in the match

selections.name_ch: 利雲特半場勝[1:0] & 利雲特全場勝[3:1]
selections.name_en: Levante to win [1:0] in the first half & Levante to win [3:1] in the match

selections.name_ch: 利雲特半場勝[1:0] & 利雲特全場勝[4:0]
selections.name_en: Levante to win [1:0] in the first half & Levante to win [4:0] in the match

selections.name_ch: 利雲特半場勝[2:0] & 利雲特全場勝[3:1]
selections.name_en: Levante to win [2:0] in the first half & Levante to win [3:1] in the match

selections.name_ch: 利雲特半場勝[2:0] & 利雲特全場勝[4:0]
selections.name_en: Levante to win [2:0] in the first half & Levante to win [4:0] in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場和[1:1] & 基羅納全場勝[3:1]
selections.name_en: First half to be drawn [1:1] & Girona to win [3:1] in the match

selections.name_ch: 半場及全場和 & 全場開出總角球少於[8.5]球
selections.name_en: Both first half and the match to be drawn & Under [8.5] corners taken in the match
